creator: val@packett.cool
text:
heh, I've also created a port for that some time ago :)

https://github.com/myfreeweb/freebsd-ports-dank/blob/955b576dc5a0369e4486d9e5ca073a584b0e2d63/x11/kitty/Makefile

https://github.com/myfreeweb/freebsd-ports-dank/blob/955b576dc5a0369e4486d9e5ca073a584b0e2d63/x11/kitty/files/patch-glfw_memfd.h

https://github.com/myfreeweb/freebsd-ports-dank/blob/955b576dc5a0369e4486d9e5ca073a584b0e2d63/x11/kitty/files/patch-glfw_wl__window.c

you could take the libwayland/epoll related lines from the makefile and the patches linked above to enable building glfw-wayland.so.
